title: Backend Engineer - GO
description: Lifemote Networks At Lifemote, we build AI-driven Wi-Fi Analytics tools that help Internet Service Providers gain visibility into the quality of connectivity at customers’ homes and create proactive solutions. Lifemote helps transform how Internet Service Providers access home connectivity data, complement their first and second line of Customer Service operations, and create value by driving up customer satisfaction at home. Comprising a vibrant and youthful group of professionals, Lifemote boasts expertise in the realm of Wi-Fi Analytics. Our solution has been successfully deployed on over 6 million devices spanning 7 European countries. Our team is rapidly expanding in tandem with our ambitious aspirations for the future. We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our team and help us build solid products. The design and development of scalable, reliable backend services and their maintenance require the fine craftsmanship of skillful backend engineers. They are pillar stones of our company; they give life to and nourish our highly anticipated and highly acclaimed product. As the old adage goes: “The Backend giveth and the Backend taketh away” About the Position Must-Have Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals Have +2 years of software development experience Highly eager to learn and quick learner Experienced with Go and/or Kotlin Proficient in concurrency concepts and async programming Experienced in REST and gRPC API design and development Experienced in Relational DBMS like MySQL Experienced with Git version control system Experience with unit testing, integration testing, and load testing Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines Strong collaboration skills, system thinking, and ability to clearly explain complex concepts Self-motivated and self-managing with strong organizational skills Strong English language communication skills Nice to Have (one or more) Experience with Quarkus framework Experience working with cloud services particularly AWS Understanding of infrastructure as code using Terraform Fundamental understanding of computer networks, as the role requires frequent interaction with network-related concepts and tasks Basic experience with frontend technologies like React and TypeScript Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, reliable, maintainable backend services Troubleshoot and debug applications Design and implement scalable, reliable, maintainable backend services. Stand up for improvements to software quality, security, and performance. Troubleshoot and debug applications. Champion testing, reusability, and readability within the development team. Encourage innovation and foster an environment of continuous improvement. Maintain in-depth knowledge of the organization's technologies and architectures. What You’ll Achieve? The realm of ISP technology is vast, dynamic, and ever-evolving. Each day, you'll dive into the exciting waves of Wi-Fi and in-home Wi-Fi analytics. And guess what? This adventure doesn't have an expiration date. Over two decades and beyond, there will always be something new to explore and master. But that's not all. As a key contributor to the industry, you'll shine brightly in the spotlight, building enduring relationships with leaders across various domains – from the technical realm to the business sphere and everything in between. Your influence will span industries and continents, making your mark on the future of connectivity. What's in it for you? We will provide you with a competitive salary, stock option plan, competitive private health insurance coverage, and a lunch card. You will have access to an online training platform and get funding for conferences & events. You will be able to work with clients from the Netherlands, Norway, Austria, the UK, and worldwide.Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Lifemote!

title: Full Stack Engineer (Backend Heavy)
description: 📍 Lokasyon: Ankara 🕓 Pozisyon Türü: Tam Zamanlı (Ofis İçi) 🏢 Departman: Yazılım Geliştirme 🧭 Pozisyonun Amacı ADL Kurumsal bünyesindeki teknoloji, çağrı merkezi ve çevre teknolojileri projelerinde; ölçeklenebilir, güvenli ve sürdürülebilir sistemler geliştirecek, backend mimarisine yön verecek ve gerektiğinde frontend süreçlerine katkı sağlayacak Full Stack Software Engineer (Backend Ağırlıklı) arıyoruz. Bu rol; yalnızca feature geliştirmek değil, aynı zamanda mimari kararlar almak, performans optimizasyonu yapmak, kod standartlarını belirlemek ve sistem tasarımına aktif katkı sağlamak anlamına gelir. 🏗 Backend (Ana Sorumluluk Alanı) ✅ Node.js & NestJS ile ölçeklenebilir ve modüler backend mimarisi kurmak ✅ RESTful API ve GraphQL servisleri tasarlamak ve geliştirmek ✅ Microservices architecture prensiplerine uygun servisler geliştirmek ✅ API versioning, rate limiting, authentication & authorization (JWT, OAuth2) implementasyonu ✅ Database tasarımı, index optimizasyonu ve query performans iyileştirmeleri ✅ Caching (Redis), queue sistemleri (RabbitMQ / Kafka vb.) ile entegrasyon ✅ Logging, monitoring ve error tracking sistemleri kurmak ✅ CI/CD süreçlerine katkı sağlamak ✅ Unit, integration ve e2e test süreçlerini yürütmek 💾 Veritabanı ✅ PostgreSQL ile ilişkisel veri modelleme ✅ MongoDB ile NoSQL veri modelleme ✅ Migration süreçlerini yönetmek ✅ Transaction yönetimi ve veri bütünlüğü sağlamak ✅ Query optimizasyonu ve performans analizi yapmak 💻 Frontend (Destekleyici Rol) ✅ React / Next.js ile mevcut projelere katkı sağlamak ✅ Backend entegrasyonlarını yönetmek ✅ API contract’larını frontend ekipleriyle koordine etmek ✅ TypeScript ile tip güvenli veri akışı sağlamak 🧱 Kod Standartları & Mühendislik Prensipleri Bu pozisyonda kod kalitesi kritik önemdedir: ✔ SOLID prensiplerine uygun geliştirme ✔ Clean Architecture ve Domain-Driven Design yaklaşımı ✔ DRY, KISS prensiplerine bağlılık ✔ Linting, formatting ve code review disiplinine uyum ✔ Yüksek test coverage hedefi ✔ Güvenli kod yazımı (OWASP best practices) ✔ Performans ve bellek optimizasyonu bilinci ✔ Scalable & maintainable system design yaklaşımı 🎯 Adayda Aradığımız NiteliklerZorunlu Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun En az 4 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip Node.js ve NestJS ile backend geliştirme konusunda güçlü deneyim sahibi React ve Next.js ile modern frontend uygulamaları geliştirmiş PostgreSQL ve MongoDB veri tabanlarında yetkin Mikroservis mimarisi, servisler arası iletişim ve ölçeklenebilir sistem tasarımı konularında bilgi sahibi Authentication, authorization ve güvenlik katmanlarında tecrübeli Git flow, code review ve temiz kod geliştirme prensiplerine hakim Unit ve integration test süreçlerini aktif olarak uygulayan Docker ile containerization ve deployment süreçlerinde deneyimli Teknik analiz, sistem tasarımı ve mimari karar süreçlerinde sorumluluk alabilecek Artı Değerler ⭐ Kubernetes deneyimi ⭐ Event-driven architecture bilgisi ⭐ High-traffic sistemlerde çalışma deneyimi ⭐ CI/CD pipeline kurulumu (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI vb.) ⭐ Message broker sistemleri deneyimi ⭐ Agile/Scrum süreçlerine katılım

title: مطور php fullstack
company: Madar Solutions | شركة مدار للحلول البرمجية
description: عودة للوظائف تفاصيل الوظيفة مطور php fullstack يتطلب العمل في هذا المجال مهارات قوية في لغة PHP وفهم عميق للتطوير الويب بمختلف جوانبه. كما يحتاج المطور Full Stack PHP إلى القدرة على التعامل مع القواعد البيانات واستخدام إطارات العمل (Frameworks) والأدوات المتنوعة لتسهيل العملية التطويرية. في مكان العمل، تأخذ المسؤوليات والواجبات دورًا مهمًا في ضمان سير العمل بسلاسة وتحقيق النجاح والتميز. ينبغي لكل موظف أن يدرك الأهمية الكبيرة لهذه المسؤوليات ويكون مستعدًا للالتزام بها. المساهمة في تحقيق أهداف المنتج والشركة بشكل عام، سواء من خلال تطوير ميزات ومشاريع جديدة أو العمل على الصيانة (إصلاح الأخطاء، تحسين الأداء، تصحيح الثغرات الأمانية، إلخ). تطوير خدمات مايكروسيرفس ذات متطلبات توسعية عالية. تأكيد أن عملك يأخذ بعين الاعتبار القدرة على التوسع، الأداء والموثوقية. المشاركة في الهندسة الأفقية والعمودية للميزات الجديدة ومراجعة الميزات الحالية. استخدام التقنيات المبتكرة والحديثة لحل المشكلات المعقدة المتعلقة بأنظمة البرنامج كخدمة وأنظمة التوفر العالي في سياق عمليات النقل الحديثة. المؤهلات والمهارات هي عناصر أساسية لتحقيق النجاح في مختلف مجالات الحياة والعمل. PHP 7+ (Yii، Laravel، إلخ). HTTP REST APIs، التطوير والتوثيق (OAS 3). jQuery (الصيانة والاستبدال المحتمل). React و/أو Angular او Vue يعتبر امتلاك الشخص لمجموعة من المهارات والكفاءات الشخصية والمهنية هو أساس رئيسي للتميز وتحقيق النجاح في حياته العملية والشخصية، ويساهم في بناء مستقبل مشرق ومتميز. خبرة كبيرة في تطوير PHP 7+ وأسس قوية في البرمجة الكائنية التوجيهية (OOP). خبرة في العمل مع استجابات REST API في تنسيق JSON. خبرة في العمل مع إحدى إطارات PHP الحديثة، مثل Laravel، Yii، Symfony، إلخ. خبرة في تطوير واستخدام RESTful API. مهارات متقدمة في استخدام Git (سواء النسخ الاحتياطي عبر الواجهة الرسومية أو سطر الأوامر) وأفضل الممارسات في التحكم في الإصدارات لتطوير الويب. خبرة في اختبار الوحدات في بيئة CI/CD. مهارات تحليلية قوية ومهارات تواصل كتابية ممتازة. القدرة على التعلم بسرعة والتعرف على تفاصيل الأنظمة المترابطة المتعددة. الخبرة في أي من العناصر التالية تُعَدّ ميزة إضافية. معرفة قوية بلغة JavaScript. يُعَدّ TypeScript من الميزات الإضافية؛ حيث ستعمل مع React و Angular باستخدام TypeScript.

title: Backend Engineer, Python
description: Department: Research and Development Location: Remote - Türkiye, or Hybrid - New Delhi Compensation: $48,000 - $60,000 / year Description Surgo Health is a Public Benefit Corporation building the world’s most comprehensive and insightful AI-powered data platform that reveals the why behind people’s behaviors. We uncover the unseen drivers of health - people’s beliefs, barriers, and behaviors - and transform that intelligence into scalable products that enable healthcare organizations to drive impact, reduce costs, and advance inclusion. From improving clinical trial design to optimizing care delivery and public health strategies, our solutions help decision-makers act on what truly shapes health outcomes. By revealing the human side of healthcare, we’re making it more personal, precise, and effective - for everyone. We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our growing R&D Engineering team. If you are excited by the idea of building scalable, innovative products, this is the role for you. As part of a collaborative and fast-paced team, you’ll play a key role in implementing the backend architecture and functionality for our AI interview platform. You will help scale the product by developing robust APIs, integrating GenAI functionality, and building a solid foundation for high-performance, secure, and reliable systems. This is a great opportunity for someone with a strong engineering background who wants to have real ownership, shape product architecture, and contribute to a mission-driven platform. What you’ll achieve: Build out and scale backend systems for our AI-powered interview platform Design, implement, and maintain production-ready APIs that support AI-driven features Help shape and evolve our system architecture for scalability, reliability, and performance Collaborate closely with the product team to deliver new features. Support and enforce best practices for backend engineering, monitoring, testing, and code quality Work with cloud infrastructure (Azure) to deploy, monitor, and optimize backend services Ensure security, privacy, and compliance in the design and handling of sensitive healthcare-related data Take ownership of features from design to production, with autonomy and accountability Contribute to shaping our engineering culture and infrastructure as we grow About you: You have 3–5 years of experience in backend development in Python. You have proven experience designing and building API systems in production You have experience working with relational databases, particularly PostgreSQL You are familiar with cloud platforms (Azure preferred) You are familiar with developing LLM-driven applications in production. You hold a University degree in Computer Science or a related field You understand and value software engineering best practices, testing, and CI/CD pipelines You are independent, proactive, and able to deliver features end-to-end with minimal supervision You are fluent in English, both written and spoken You thrive in fast-moving environments where you can take ownership and iterate quickly Location: This is a Türkiye-based or New Delhi-based role . Surgo is headquartered in Washington, DC, but our team is spread across the US, UK, and India. Benefits Fantastic, fun and collaborative colleagues; opportunity to solve tough challenges in healthcare Ability to be entrepreneurial and tremendous opportunities for growth Public Benefit Corporation with an impact and equity mission Competitive compensation Professional Development opportunities Surgo Health is committed to fair, equitable, and transparent practices. Compensation packages are based on several factors such as skill set, prior relevant experience, education, certifications, and market considerations. In addition to base compensation, individuals may be eligible for annual performance-based bonuses and equity (if applicable). We aim to pay salaries that are competitive, benchmarked against companies that are similar in stage, size, and market to Surgo Health. Our recruiter may be able to share more about our total rewards offerings and the specific salary range for the relevant role during the hiring process. Our hiring philosophy We hire for passion and core competencies. We look for problem solvers and lateral thinkers. We love it if you have done different things with your time. If you think you are ideal for this position, write to us even if your experience doesn’t match all the requirements listed above. Equal Opportunity and Diversity Policy Surgo believes a diverse, inclusive staff makes a stronger team and more impactful organization and we are committed to building and developing this team and environment. Qualified people of all races, ethnicities, cultures, ages, sex, genders, sexual orientation, gender identities and expressions, languages, social class, marital status, religions, veterans status, and disabilities are strongly encouraged to apply.
